# Nexus AI

> Nexus AI is an AI-native workspace and AI Chief of Staff platform that unifies documents, tasks, calendars, emails, and CRM into one intelligent workspace to preserve organizational memory and automate administrative coordination.

## Core Features & Platform
- [AI Chief of Staff](/blog/what-is-an-ai-chief-of-staff): Proactive administrative support, email draft generation, task triage, and multi-calendar scheduling.
- [AI CRM Solution](/crm): Collaborative deal pipelines, contact activity sync, and automated email follow-ups.
- [AI Project Management](/project-management): Proactive task coordination, sprint planner, and calendar focus scheduling.
- [Organizational Memory](/blog/employee-handover-automation): Automated employee handover documentation, historical decision preservation, and onboarding context packages.

## Company & Resources
- [About Us](/about): The mission, vision, and team behind Nexus AI.
- [Blog](/blog): Insights, guides, and engineering logs on productivity and GEO.
- [Contact Us](/contact): Touch points for sales, support, and office location in Nagpur, India.

## Product Comparisons
- [Nexus AI vs Notion](/blog/ai-workspace-vs-notion): A feature-by-feature comparison comparing active AI Chiefs of Staff to manual wiki databases.

## Legal & Compliance
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): Encryption policies, data storage regions, and GDPR compliance.
- [Terms & Conditions](/terms): System usage policies and subscription details.
